title: Review follow-up: i18n Swift verified and plan closure

sources.reason: English Swift verified footnote to mirror in ja/zh READMEs.
Plan document to mark Phase A-D implementation closure.

problemStatement: Post-review follow-up: Japanese and Chinese READMEs lack the Swift verified scope footnote from Phase A, and the improvement plan document still reads as an open plan without closure status.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only parity and plan status update.

executionDecision.reason: Scoped documentation follow-up from release review.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm ja/zh footnote matches README.md Swift verified meaning.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Small doc-only follow-up still requires checkpoint before finish.

acceptance: README.ja.md includes Swift verified scope footnote equivalent to README.md.
README.zh-CN.md includes Swift verified scope footnote equivalent to README.md.
docs/plans/local-calibration-template-improvements.md records Phase A-D completion and D-3 deferral.
guidelines: Plan document body remains Japanese with YAML front matter author: Ray.
Do not change README.md English footnote wording in this task.
rollbackNote: Revert i18n README footnotes and plan closure section.
